automated_required: focused behavioral/unit contracts for changed owners
exactly one final production build for a milestone
qa_policy.owner_manual_required: Coordinator sends a short yes/no checklist of visible behaviors for Owner confirmation
qa_policy.browser_automation_default: Do not run exhaustive CDP/E2E matrices by default
browser_automation_allowed_only_for: a reproducible high-risk regression that cannot be safely checked by focused contracts plus Owner QA
qa_policy.timebox: Any QA harness stall or tuning loop over 10 minutes must stop and be reported; no open-ended harness optimization
qa_policy.credit_rule: Implementation credits are prioritized over redundant QA automation
